stemHtml: An aircraft on an IFR flight, after experiencing radio communication failure in VMC, successfully lands at the nearest suitable aerodrome. What is it supposed to do next?

options.a: Report the failure by the most expeditious means to the responsible aerodrome operator.
options.b: Report the arrival by the most expeditious means to the appropriate ATC unit
options.c: Have the equipment failure repaired within 30 days by an authorised avionics repair facility.
options.d: Inform the relevant Civil Aviation Authority and have the radio failure repaired as quickly as possible.
